source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An electron moves in the plane of the page through two regions of space along the dotted-line trajectory shown in the figure. There is a uniform electric field in Region I directed into the plane of the page (as shown). There is no electric field in Region II. What is a necessary direction of the magnetic field in regions I?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Up the plane of the page
